scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ideal && npm install --prefix hotelsPro--server
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix ideal" "npm run dev --prefix hotelsPro--server"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run build --prefix ideal" "npm run build --prefix hotelsPro--server"
